sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 95

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 95:1
items.html:
(to the question) A little vitality
In that first Rucha [spirit] that the Nukva took in the first coming there are two parts: the first, belonging to her own building; and the second, what belongs to her sons — see Answer 13, and Answer 49. And after the sons have already taken all their share of that first Rucha, there still remains in her the part that is her own; and this part is called "a little vitality." (p. 745, Item 15)
